title: grammitis praeceps
intro: Grammitis praeceps, also known as the creeping fern or sensitive fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Grammitis praeceps include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
